SEARCH

Uses of Package
cpdt.common.enums

Packages that use cpdt.common.enums
Package
Description
cpdt.backend.controllers
Provides REST controllers for the Digital Twin backend.
cpdt.backend.repositories
Defines the data access layer for the Digital Twin backend.
cpdt.backend.services
Implements the business logic of the Digital Twin backend.
cpdt.backend.twin
Provides components for maintaining the Digital Twin state.
cpdt.common.dto
Provides the Data Transfer Objects (DTOs) used throughout the Chemical Plant Digital Twin (CPDT) platform.
cpdt.common.enums
Provides the enumerated types used throughout the Chemical Plant Digital Twin (CPDT) platform.
cpdt.common.models
Provides the core domain models used throughout the Chemical Plant Digital Twin (CPDT) platform.
cpdt.common.utils
Provides utility classes shared across the Chemical Plant Digital Twin (CPDT) platform.
cpdt.simulator
Provides the simulation layer of the Chemical Plant Digital Twin (CPDT) platform.
cpdt.simulator.engine
Provides the core simulation engine responsible for executing the chemical plant simulation.
cpdt.simulator.environment
Provides the environmental model used by the chemical plant simulator.
cpdt.simulator.scenarios
Provides simulation scenarios that introduce predefined operating conditions and events into the chemical plant simulation.
  • Classes in cpdt.common.enums used by cpdt.backend.controllers
    Class
    Description
    ProcessArea
    Represents the distinct process areas within the simulated chemical plant.
  • Classes in cpdt.common.enums used by cpdt.backend.repositories
    Class
    Description
    MeasurementType
    Enumerates every physical quantity that can be measured by the simulated devices.
    ProcessArea
    Represents the distinct process areas within the simulated chemical plant.
  • Classes in cpdt.common.enums used by cpdt.backend.services
    Class
    Description
    AlarmState
    Represents the state transition of a process alarm after evaluating newly received telemetry.
    AlertSeverity
    Defines the severity level assigned to an alert generated by the Digital Twin.
    DeviceStatus
    Represents the current operational status of a device within the Chemical Plant Digital Twin Platform.
    ProcessArea
    Represents the distinct process areas within the simulated chemical plant.
  • Classes in cpdt.common.enums used by cpdt.backend.twin
    Class
    Description
    ProcessArea
    Represents the distinct process areas within the simulated chemical plant.

    Class
    Description
    AlertSeverity
    Defines the severity level assigned to an alert generated by the Digital Twin.
    DeviceStatus
    Represents the current operational status of a device within the Chemical Plant Digital Twin Platform.
    DeviceType
    Enumerates every supported device type that can exist within the Chemical Plant Digital Twin Platform.
    MeasurementType
    Enumerates every physical quantity that can be measured by the simulated devices.
    ProcessArea
    Represents the distinct process areas within the simulated chemical plant.
